candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue; matches definition of total revenue/sales and is the primary operating revenue line.
Financial income, not operating revenue; considered but rejected because it is below operating line and not total sales.

variables.notes: Selected the main operating revenue line 'Total Revenue' as the single priority revenue series.

candidates.row_label: Costs of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Explicit aggregate cost of goods/services sold line; best match for direct production/service costs (COGS).
Component of COGS, but a subset; less appropriate than the aggregate COGS line.
Adjustment component of COGS rather than the full direct cost line.

final_choice.row_label: Costs of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Best semantic match for COGS is 'Costs of goods and services sold', which is not included in the provided candidate list. I chose this aggregate COGS line instead of components like 'Raw materials and finished goods' or 'Changes in Inventory'. candidates.why: Classic SG&A component (personnel/overhead costs), not COGS-specific here.
Broad operating overhead bucket; standard SG&A-type expenses.
Additional SG&A-type operating expenses; small but clearly overhead.
Share-based comp is an SG&A-type personnel/overhead expense by definition.
Operating rental expense; typical SG&A component and not categorized under COGS here.
Selling/marketing expense, which is part of SG&A.
Selling/marketing expense, part of SG&A.

candidates.why: Additional operating lease-related overhead; appropriate SG&A component.

final_choice.row_label: Expenses related to short-term leases and low value assets

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; directly matches the R&D concept.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line; best first-priority series for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity excluding non-controlling interests; ideal definition of book equity for PROF denominator.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; considered but rejected to avoid double counting with MIB.
Component of equity; less comprehensive than the total equity attributable to owners.
Another component of equity; not the full equity measure.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Used 'Equity attributable to owners of the parent' to represent book equity, excluding non-controlling interests in line with instructions.

candidates.why: Balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interests; matches MIB definition.
Income statement allocation of profit; not the stock (balance sheet) of minority interest, so not used for MIB level.
Flows to non-controlling interests, not the equity balance; not used for BE+MIB denominator.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet stock of 'Non-controlling interests' to complement BE without double counting.
